rulings.Case Title: DON ROBERTS VS. DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 1, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP, LARISSA ABRAMOVA, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition, Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Parties to meet and confer regarding the deposition date. Plaintiff to obtain all Plaintiff's medical and mental health records from his providers, date stamp them and then to produce the relevant ones at his deposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $870.70 within 5 days. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DON ROBERTS VS. DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Don Roberts And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 1, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP, LARISSA ABRAMOVA, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. Notice Of Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Don Roberts And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DON ROBERTS VS. DOROTHY DAY COMMUNITY, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff Don Roberts Further Responses And Production Of Documents, And Request For Sanctions

rulings.Case Title: EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL VS. CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend To Add Individual Defendant And Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 1, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF EL BETHEL ARMS, INC., EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend To Add Individual Defendant And Cause Of Action GRANTED, Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BECK & BLOOM, LLC VS. HAWK LOU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 1, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, THE HAWK LING LOU AND KETTY FONG LOU MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts supporting request for punitive damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BECK & BLOOM, LLC VS. HAWK LOU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 1, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, THE HAWK LING LOU AND KETTY FONG LOU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for declaratory relief. See Friedman v. Isenbruck (1952) 111 Cal.App.2d 326; Barrows v. The Wm. Simpson Construction Co. (1929) 102 Cal.App.254; Complaint, paragraphs 12, 15, 18; Lease paragraph 1; Emergency Order 107951 E, paragraph 1. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. The Court Notes that Request For Judicial Notice did not include any attachments. Documents are attached to Dreher declaration under Exhibit numbers not coinciding with numbering stated in the Request for Judicial Notice. =(501/REQ)
